successCriteria: Users can copy selected text from terminal using Ctrl+Shift+C
Users can paste text into terminal using Ctrl+Shift+V
Existing keyboard shortcuts are not broken

phases.title: Add clipboard copy/paste to Terminal component
phases.content: Modify Terminal.tsx to add a custom key event handler on xterm.js that intercepts Ctrl+Shift+C (copy) and Ctrl+Shift+V (paste). Use navigator.clipboard API for clipboard access. For copy: get selection via xterm.getSelection() and write to clipboard. For paste: read from clipboard and call xterm.paste(). Also change the existing Ctrl+Shift+V shortcut for split vertical in TerminalPane.tsx to use Ctrl+Shift+\ instead to avoid conflict.
verification: Ctrl+Shift+C copies selected terminal text to clipboard
Ctrl+Shift+V pastes clipboard content into terminal
Split vertical shortcut changed to Ctrl+Shift+\
